profile.tooltip: Name (case-insensitive substring) or D-Bus path of the openvpn3 profile this desklet controls. Leave empty to use whatever the last connected profile was.

compact.tooltip: Shrink the desklet to the 240px minimal layout (no stats grid, mini sparkline).

cli_path.tooltip: Absolute path to the o3ui binary. Leave empty to search $PATH (which won't include ~/.local/bin under Cinnamon's session unless you set it).
